user_stories.action: see sequential task numbers [1], [2], [3] during workflow execution
user_stories.benefit: I can quickly count how many phases are in the workflow and which number I'm on

user_stories.action: see completed tasks visually struck through in the task list
user_stories.benefit: I can instantly distinguish completed phases from pending/active ones without reading status labels

user_stories.action: see a clean, non-duplicate task display as workflow progresses
user_stories.benefit: I am not confused by stale or duplicate task entries on screen

user_stories.action: see which phase is currently active with a spinner indicator
user_stories.benefit: I know the workflow is actively working and which phase it is on
